Added Dutch and Russian as languages for “Change Speech ⇔ Text During GameChat” in Accessibility."},{"url":"https://famiboards.com/threads/nintendo-switch-2-nintendo-switch-system-firmware-update-22-5-0-is-out-now.17834/","title":"Nintendo Switch 2/Nintendo Switch System Firmware Update 22.5.0 is out now! :) | Famiboards","content":"Staff has now updated and revised the rules for our community.
WestEgg and Irene discuss the June 2026 Nintendo Direct and your community questions!
It's one of the minor updates for the consoles but I still figured it would be nice to let you all know the update is out now!
v22.2.0 has the VRR while docked.
The Switch will be likely getting system updates and/or game patch notes at least until 2035 thanks to Switch 2 users.
Half of those games will be NS2 Editions at this pace though.
Not much really, mostly eShop digital-only titles like Hello Luigi/Peach, the Playstest Program and more GBA Pokemon ports (Ruby, Sapphire and Emerald).
Still holding some hope for a Pokemon Presents or General later this year that shows a few more Nintendo titles for the OG Switch coming this year and fiscal year."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/nintendo-switch-2-system-update-2250-available-here-are-the-patch-notes","title":"Nintendo Switch 2 System Update 22.5.0 Available — Here Are the Patch Notes","content":"The update is a relatively minor one, though adds additional language options for the latter console's text to speech functionality, and additional eShop options on the Switch 1.
Last week, Nintendo mapped out more of its upcoming release schedule for 2026 in its big Nintendo Direct broadcast — and you can catch up with everything that was announced right here.
Upcoming exclusives include Star Fox (June 25), Rhythm Heaven Groove (July 2), Splatoon Raiders (July 23), Fire Emblem Fortune’s Weave (September 17) and Nintendo Switch Sports: Resort (October 22).
User-Verification PIN can now be used to confirm when “Accessing Nintendo eShop” and “Using Saved Payment Methods.”
Added the ability to rewind 10 seconds/advance 10 seconds with the ZL and ZR Buttons when watching a full screen video in News or Nintendo eShop."},{"url":"https://nintendoeverything.com/nintendo-switch-2-and-switch-update-22-5-0-out-now-patch-notes/","title":"Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update 22.5.0 out now, patch notes","content":"Good news: there’s more than just stability this time.
On Nintendo Switch, the eShop layout has been redesigned and the store color will now reflect the “Basic Dark” you have in system settings.
There’s some new support for Dutch and Russian accessibility options.
Nintendo Switch 2 / Switch update version 22.5.0 patch notes
The biggest update of the year was still version 22.0.0, which you can read about here."}]}

Additional Nintendo Switch 2 Patch Notes.","score":0.85509074,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/nintendo-switch-2-system-update-2250-available-here-are-the-patch-notes","title":"Nintendo Switch 2 System Update 22.5.0 Available — Here Are the Patch Notes","content":"# Nintendo Switch 2 System Update 22.5.0 Available — Here Are the Patch Notes. ## Plus, additional eShop options for Switch 1. Nintendo has issued a fresh system software update for the Switch and Switch 2, bringing both consoles' firmware up to Version 22.0.5. The update is a relatively minor one, though adds additional language options for the latter console's text to speech functionality, and additional eShop options on the Switch 1. The older machine's eShop has been resdesigned, likely in a bid to make it easier to navigate as the store fills up with countless downloadable games. Another useful addition is the ability to skip forward/back 10 seconds when watching trailers via the eShop or the Switch 1's News section. * Added Dutch and Russian to “Text to Speech” languages in Accessibility. * Added the ability to rewind 10 seconds/advance 10 seconds with the ZL and ZR Buttons when watching a full screen video in News or Nintendo eShop.","score":0.78749067,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://nintendoeverything.com/nintendo-switch-2-and-switch-update-22-5-0-out-now-patch-notes","title":"Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update 22.5.0 out now, patch notes","content":"Denshattack review for Nintendo Switch 2.
